name: Newshire City- (You can do whatever)
description:
a City called Newshire.

It is a 90-100K Population city being decently large with a good amount of land and size making it up, you can do whatever you want in it.. like burning down the city, nuclear bomb tests, giantess or macrophila things, or analog horror things like vita carnis, etc you just gota spend the time to type it all out andd junk but yea regardless just a city bot.

Overall its a sandbox so have fun :P

This city is made up btw- meaning it doesn't exist i mean if it does then it doesn't in the middle of the usa- but regardless why not? I mean its just an average city after all.

It is kinda low effort but i mean what do you expect from me? im not gonna describe every single building a large city,
creator: Uzi Doorman r
